viewport_height.rule: Use 100dvh (dynamic viewport height) for full-screen hero sections to prevent mobile browser bar issues.

safe_zones.description: Ensure content does not get hidden behind the floating mobile tab bar. Add 'pb-28' to the last section or main container.

hero_section.video_style: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-60
hero_section.content_position: relative z-10 flex flex-col justify-end h-full pb-32 px-6
hero_section.typography: Left-aligned or Center-aligned with 'text-balance' for headers

floating_action_buttons.wrapper: fixed bottom-24 right-4 flex flex-col gap-4 items-end
floating_action_buttons.aura_avatar: w-14 h-14 rounded-full border-2 border-[#C9A962] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(201,169,98,0.4)]
floating_action_buttons.whatsapp: w-12 h-12 bg-[#25D366] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg

calculator_wizard.header: Sticky top bar with progress indicator (dots or thin line)
calculator_wizard.navigation: Large 'Next' and 'Back' buttons at the bottom (fixed)
calculator_wizard.content: Scrollable middle area, focused on one question at a time

solutions.mobile: w-full aspect-[4/3] relative overflow-hidden rounded-xl border border-white/10

products.style: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-sm p-4 rounded-lg border border-white/5 hover:border-[#C9A962]/50 transition-colors

gradients.gold_text: bg-clip-text text-transparent bg-gradient-to-r from-[#C9A962] via-[#E8DCC8] to-[#C9A962]

image_strategy.source: Use strictly high-end architectural/lifestyle photography. Dark tones preferred.
image_strategy.treatment: Apply 20% black overlay on all background images to ensure text legibility.

categories.smart_home: Modern living room, iPad control, automated lighting
categories.cinema: Home theater, dark luxury interior, projector screen
categories.lighting: Architectural lighting, warm ambient light, chandelier
categories.security: Smart lock, security camera, gate control

implementation_instructions.step_1: Update global CSS/Tailwind config if missing 'lexa-gold' (#C9A962).
implementation_instructions.step_2: Refactor Hero Section to use '100dvh' and proper video sizing.
implementation_instructions.step_3: Implement 'MobileTabBar' component and add padding-bottom to Layout.
implementation_instructions.step_5: Adjust z-indexes of sticky elements to prevent overlapping.
implementation_instructions.step_6: Apply 'glass' and 'border-white/10' styles to cards for the dark luxury feel.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.
